title: chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. montanum
intro: Chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. montanum, also known as the Mountain Daisy, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family, characterized by its bright yellow daisy-like flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The Mountain Daisy has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. Herbal preparations of Chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. montanum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
